text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I cross the threshold into this exhibition space. The glass walls and clean architecture evoke a sterile, contemplative atmosphere, while the vibrant, almost playful display inside invites curiosity. Seeing "R+D" and words about humans and intelligent machines, I feel intellectually stimulated, aware of the ever-evolving relationship between creation and understanding. My presence here is part observation, part participation in the endless dance between knowledge and the unknown.
